calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-15-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-10-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: David Mendez, Atty for Plaintiff B. D. Thakor

Bridgette Marie Jones, Defendant in Propria Persona

JUDGE PROTEM: David Watson; CLERK: E. Estacio; CSR: Patty Van Steenberge (306A)

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. Case settled read into the record. Settlement terms as follows:
- Stip for judgment in favor of plaintiff and against defendant. Deft. to pay rent in the amount of $1,950.00 + return of possession at 118 Taylor Street,#407, SF, CA. Writ to issue immediately but no actual eviction until 4/2/04 by 9PM. Each side to bear own costs and atty fees. Trial date of Mar-15-2004 remains. See reporter's transcript for further terms and condition.
